In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], then-[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] used a '''shuttle''' of a different class than the [[Sheathipede-class transport shuttle/Legends|''Sheathipede''-class transport shuttle]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was capable of [[Transport/Legends|transporting]] numerous [[HKB-3 hunter-killer droid]]s. It had a similar design to the contemporary [[Captor-class heavy munitions cruiser|Trade Federation bacta ship]].

==History==
[[File:Shut23.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The destruction of Gunray's shuttle.]]
Gunray traveled to [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]] aboard this shuttle. The shuttle was destroyed by the forces of the treacherous [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] along with many onboard [[Droid/Legends|droids]], but Gunray was not on the shuttle at the time.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]] {{Flash}}
